metadata_information.title: Big dragon, little dragons : China's challenge to the machinery exports of southeast Asia
metadata_information.version: Python script, from D&R API, generated on 2026-03-19

title_statement.title: Big dragon, little dragons : China's challenge to the machinery exports of southeast Asia

document_description.abstract: This paper investigates the extent of China's export boom in machinery and analyzes trade in components and finished machinery between China and Southeast Asia. China has increased its world market share in machinery exports. The median relative unit value of its finished machinery exports has also risen. Yet the author finds no evidence that China's expansion in the world machinery market has squeezed the market shares of Southeast Asian machinery exports. Instead, components made by Southeast Asian countries are increasing in unit value and gaining market share in China.
